summary: Iteration 18 — Weekly Card gamification, Betting Tips hub (/vihjeet), Winners Corner, and full brand-chrome bilingual rollout. Backend: 15/15 pytest pass. Frontend: every listed acceptance criterion verified live in EN + FI at desktop. Production state restored after admin draw test (3 test entries deleted, winner pointer cleared).

test_evidence.weekly_meta_defaults: prize_amount=100, prize_currency='EUR', prize_label='Weekly Card cash prize', locked=false, results=[], entry_count, winner=null
test_evidence.weekly_submit_telegram_handle_validation: Rejected 'no' with 422 (regex ^[A-Za-z0-9_]{3,32}$); rejected 5-digit SMS handle with 422
test_evidence.weekly_submit_upsert_same_email: entry_count unchanged across 2 submits; entry_id stable
test_evidence.admin_prize_update: PUT /api/admin/weekly/2099-W52/prize {200, EUR, Custom} persisted & visible via public meta
test_evidence.admin_results_settle: PUT results auto-locks the week and re-scores all entries (correct_count + settled=true)
test_evidence.admin_draw_winner: POST /api/admin/weekly/{wk}/draw returned winner.email_hash + winner_email from highest correct_count cohort
test_evidence.odds_upcoming_7d: GET /api/odds/upcoming?days=7 → days[] length=7 with date + picks[] each (calendar grouped)
test_evidence.winners_recent_shape: {winners:[], total} returned; admin create computed profit = (odds-1)*units (2.50→3.0 for 2 units)
test_evidence.vihjeet_tabs: Today / Tomorrow / This week (3 tabs visible)
test_evidence.vihjeet_calendar_tiles: 7 day tiles rendered (Mon 18 May → Sun 24 May) with pick counts per day (3,2,2,1,1,5,5)
test_evidence.vihjeet_pick_card_first: Arsenal vs Burnley — Odds 1.11 · 90% — editorial take + 5 share icons + COPY LINK button rendered
test_evidence.header_tips_nav: Header now has 'TIPS' link → /vihjeet (visible in screenshot, 1 anchor counted)
test_evidence.weekly_card_prize_banner: €100 cash prize banner rendered with trophy + 'Weekly Card cash prize' subtitle + 3 ENTRIES THIS WEEK counter
test_evidence.weekly_card_entry_form: ENTER THE PRIZE DRAW sidebar: email field + Telegram/SMS channel toggle (Telegram active) + handle field; submit disabled until all 5 picks set (verified via is_disabled())
test_evidence.winners_corner_homepage: WinnersCorner section renders below SocialProofBar with empty state: 'PUTKI HQ · RECENT HITS / Track record begins this week — follow on Telegram.'
test_evidence.back_office_weekly_admin: Token 'putki-hq-admin' authenticates → Weekly Card admin shows PRIZE editor (100/EUR/Weekly Card cash prize) + Save prize + Lock entries + SETTLE RESULTS · 5 FIXTURES with 1/X/2 per fixture + Save results & settle entries + ENTRIES list (3 test entries seen) + Draw Winner
test_evidence.brand_chrome_en: / shows METER · LUKEWARM 30, SCENE TEMPERATURE / PUTKI HQ METER / METER HISTORY, dial badge 'LUKEWARM', state distribution table headers COLD/LUKEWARM/HOT/STORM/FRENZY (/mittari/historia)
test_evidence.brand_chrome_fi: After FI toggle on homepage: SKENEN LÄMPÖTILA, PUTKI HQ MITTARI, MITTARIN HISTORIA, MITTARI · HAALEA/KUUMA/KYLMÄ/MYRSKY/KIIRASTULI all present
test_evidence.mittari_historia_headline_en: 'Meter history' H1 rendered + EN chart axis times (klo HH.MM still localized to FI clock — minor cosmetic, see below) + EN state distribution labels

action_items: OPTIONAL polish: /mittari/historia chart x-axis still reads '18.5. klo 12.45' regardless of language (Finnish time formatter). EN locale should produce 'May 18 · 12:45' or similar. Non-blocking.
OPTIONAL polish: Backend exposes no admin DELETE for weekly_picks entries; testing agents have to clean up via direct Mongo. Consider DELETE /api/admin/weekly/{week}/entries/{id} for hygiene.
critical_code_review_comments: weekly_card.py: handle field-validator pulls channel from info.data — this only works if pydantic v2 preserves field order (channel before handle). Current model defines channel first so OK, but a comment + an explicit pre-validator-on-model would be more robust.

weekly_card.py POST /weekly/submit ignores the week query parameter and always uses iso_week_key() — by design, but means the admin sandbox week (2099-W52) cannot accept submissions, so the end-to-end draw test had to run on the live current week (cleaned up after).
winners.py admin_create_winner inserts via dict copy then returns the original doc; fine, but the response doesn't include any _id check — minor.

BettingTipsHub share buttons render without data-testid='share-{platform}'; selectors `[data-testid*="share-telegram"]` returned 0 (still 3 telegram icons present via fallback selector). Adding share-{platform} testids would harden future automation.
Carry-over from iter 17: DialCockpit '... sitten' relative-time still hardcoded FI (unrelated to this iteration but still open).
Carry-over from iter 17: StreamerAlertModal wildcard title copy still uses generic template (unrelated to this iteration).
test_credentials: X-Admin-Token: putki-hq-admin — same token unlocks /back-office/weekly UI
seed_data_creation: Test entries created during admin draw test: 3 weekly_picks rows (emails prefixed test_iter18_*) and 1 winner pointer on the live current week. ALL cleaned up post-run via direct Mongo delete + meta reset. Sandbox week 2099-W52 meta left in default state (results=[], locked=false).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend regression suite for iter 18 lives at /app/backend/tests/test_iter18_weekly_tips_winners.py and uses a 2099-W52 sandbox week for prize/results writes; only the draw test touches the live week and restores state in a finally block. POST /api/weekly/submit always writes to the current ISO week — there's no admin-side way to backfill a different week. /vihjeet renders real Odds API data; on a low-fixture day picks_count per day may drop to 0 — empty-state copy still verified. Share buttons on /vihjeet do NOT carry per-platform data-testids; future testing should rely on icon SVGs or anchor href patterns (telegram.me, twitter.com/intent/tweet, facebook.com/sharer, wa.me, etc.). EN locale times on /mittari/historia chart axis remain in FI format.
